title: Dandelions by the Roots
writer: Clarence Weff, Georges Lautner, Albert Kantof
actors: Michel Serrault, Maurice Biraud, Louis de Funès
plot: Jockey Jack has a bill open with a gangster just released from jail. He somehow manages to parry the gangster's knife attack backstage at a theatre and the latter ends up dead being put into a double bass case. A day later the gan...
